---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for AESTHETIX V-Track
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## 🎯 Problem It Solves

Describe the problem or limitation this feature would address.

Example: *"I'm frustrated when [...] because [...]"*

## 📐 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## 🏋️ Which Part of the App?

- [ ] Dashboard / Active Logger
- [ ] Workout Program & Baselines
- [ ] Training History
- [ ] Insights & Recovery
- [ ] Step / Activity Tracker
- [ ] Weight Logging
- [ ] Smart Coach / Recommendations
- [ ] Cloud Sync / Data Management
- [ ] Google Fit Integration
- [ ] Mobile UX / Design
- [ ] Docker / Deployment
- [ ] Other: ___

## 📸 Mockup / Reference

If applicable, add any wireframes, mockups, or reference screenshots.

## 📝 Additional Context

Any other context about the feature request.
